Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions:
- User account exists in the system with valid credentials.
- Network connectivity is available.
Test Steps:
1. User enters `user@example.com` in the email field.
2. User enters `SecurePass123!` in the password field.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System validates credentials and returns a success response.
- User is logged in and redirected to the dashboard.
- Session is active (e.g., logout button appears).

Title: Failed User Login (Invalid Password)
Preconditions: - User account exists with valid email but incorrect password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters `user@example.com` in the email field.
2. User enters `WrongPass123` in the password field.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects login attempt.
- Error message: "Invalid email or password" is displayed.
- User remains on the login page.

Title: Failed User Login (Non-Existent Email)
Preconditions: - No user account exists with the provided email.
Test Steps:
1. User enters `nonexistent@example.com` in the email field.
2. User enters `SecurePass123!` in the password field.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects login attempt.
- Error message: "Invalid email or password" is displayed.
- User remains on the login page.

Title: User Logout
Preconditions: - User is logged in to the system.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the "Logout" button in the top-right corner.
Expected Result:
- System terminates the user session.
- User is redirected to the login page.
- Logout confirmation message appears: "You have been logged out successfully."

Title: User Joins a Neighborhood
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Neighborhood exists in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Neighborhoods" section.
2. User selects the neighborhood with ID `123`.
3. User clicks "Join Neighborhood."
Expected Result:
- System adds the user to the neighborhood.
- Confirmation message: "You have successfully joined the neighborhood."
- Neighborhood appears in the user's list of joined neighborhoods.

Title: User Leaves a Neighborhood
Preconditions: - User is logged in and joined to a neighborhood.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Neighborhoods" section.
2. User selects the neighborhood with ID `123`.
3. User clicks "Leave Neighborhood."
Expected Result:
- System removes the user from the neighborhood.
- Confirmation message: "You have successfully left the neighborhood."
- Neighborhood no longer appears in the user's list of joined neighborhoods.

Title: User Creates a Post
Test Data:
- Title: "Community Meeting"
- Content: "Join us for a meeting on Saturday at 2 PM."
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Create Post" section.
2. User enters "Community Meeting" in the title field.
3. User enters "Join us for a meeting on Saturday at 2 PM." in the content field.
4. User clicks "Post."
Expected Result:
- System creates the post with ID `456`.
- Confirmation message: "Post created successfully."
- Post appears in the user's profile and neighborhood feed.

Title: User Deletes a Post
Preconditions: - User is logged in and has created a post with ID `456`.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to their profile or neighborhood feed.
2. User locates the post with ID `456`.
3. User clicks the "Delete" button.
4. User confirms deletion in the popup.
Expected Result:
- System deletes the post.
- Confirmation message: "Post deleted successfully."
- Post no longer appears in the user's profile or neighborhood feed.

Title: User Joins a Chat
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Chat with ID `789` exists and is accessible.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Chats" section.
2. User selects the chat with ID `789`.
3. User clicks "Join Chat."
Expected Result:
- System adds the user to the chat.
- Confirmation message: "You have joined the chat."
- Chat appears in the user's list of active chats.

Title: User Leaves a Chat
Preconditions: - User is logged in and joined to a chat with ID `789`.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Chats" section.
2. User selects the chat with ID `789`.
3. User clicks "Leave Chat."
Expected Result:
- System removes the user from the chat.
- Confirmation message: "You have left the chat."
- Chat no longer appears in the user's list of active chats.

Title: User Updates Profile Information
Test Data:
- New name: "John Doe"
- New description: "Community Leader"
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Profile" section.
2. User clicks "Edit Profile."
3. User enters "John Doe" in the name field.
4. User enters "Community Leader" in the description field.
5. User clicks "Save Changes."
Expected Result:
- System updates the user's profile.
- Confirmation message: "Profile updated successfully."
- Updated profile information is displayed.

Title: User Views Map
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Map with ID `101` exists.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Map" section.
2. User clicks "View Map."
Expected Result:
- System retrieves and displays the map with ID `101`.
- Map details (name, description) are visible.

Title: Admin Creates a New User
Test Data:
- New user email: `newuser@example.com`
- New user password: `NewPass123!`
- New user name: "New User"
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the "Users" section.
2. Admin clicks "Add User."
3. Admin enters `newuser@example.com` in the email field.
4. Admin enters `NewPass123!` in the password field.
5. Admin enters "New User" in the name field.
6. Admin clicks "Create User."
Expected Result:
- System creates the new user with ID `777`.
- Confirmation message: "User created successfully."
- New user appears in the list of users.

Title: Admin Deletes a User
Preconditions:
- Admin is logged in.
- User with ID `777` exists.
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the "Users" section.
2. Admin selects the user with ID `777`.
3. Admin clicks "Delete User."
4. Admin confirms deletion in the popup.
Expected Result:
- System deletes the user with ID `777`.
- Confirmation message: "User deleted successfully."
- User no longer appears in the list of users.

Title: Admin Logs In
Preconditions: - Admin account exists with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Admin enters `admin@example.com` in the email field.
2. Admin enters `AdminPass123!` in the password field.
3. Admin clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System validates credentials and returns a success response.
- Admin is logged in and redirected to the admin dashboard.
- Admin-specific options (e.g., "Manage Users") are visible.

Title: User Navigates to a Specific Section
Test Steps:
1. User is on the `GeneralDashboard`.
2. User clicks the "Neighborhoods" section.
3. User navigates to a `SpecificSection` (e.g., "Active Chats").
4. User returns to the `GeneralDashboard`.
Expected Result:
- System transitions smoothly between sections.
- Content in `SpecificSection` is displayed correctly.
- User can return to `GeneralDashboard` without errors.

Title: Empty Post Title Validation
Test Data:
- Title: (empty)
- Content: "This is a post with no title."
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Create Post" section.
2. User leaves the title field empty.
3. User enters "This is a post with no title." in the content field.
4. User clicks "Post."
Expected Result:
- System rejects the post creation.
- Error message: "Title is required." is displayed.
- User remains on the post creation page.

Title: Exceeding Character Limit in Post Content
Test Data:
- Title: "Long Post"
- Content: A string of 5000 characters (exceeding the assumed limit of 1000).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Create Post" section.
2. User enters "Long Post" in the title field.
3. User enters a 5000-character string in the content field.
4. User clicks "Post."
Expected Result:
- System rejects the post creation.
- Error message: "Content must be less than 1000 characters." is displayed.
- User remains on the post creation page.
